Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: You probably saw my humble garden on your way here. I have a couple of them growing in excess.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: For one reason or another, the rest of the Kweebecs feel uncomfortable around them. I might have to get rid of them in the near future.

Line.Text: If you want, you could take a few back to your home. Find a new garden for them so I don't have to throw them into compost.
